description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a sleek, boxy silhouette and a minimalist design. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a dark, smooth material, likely faux leather or vinyl, with three distinct seat and back cushions that are attached and uniform in size. The armrests are wide, straight, and padded, extending at the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a robust and contemporary appearance. The rear panel of the sofa features a contrasting light gray fabric and a wooden base, adding visual interest and a touch of warmth to the design. The legs are short, blocky, and recessed, barely visible from most angles, suggesting stability and a low profile. This sofa would be suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater sofa with dark upholstery, wide padded armrests, and a contrasting gray and wood back panel. The design is sleek and contemporary, with attached uniform cushions and a low, stable profile.
description_view_0: Front view shows three attached seat and back cushions, wide straight armrests, and a clean, minimalist face.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick, padded armrest and the continuous seat and backrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a light gray fabric back panel and a wooden base, contrasting with the dark upholstery.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest and the sofa's overall depth and structure.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached, uniform seat and back cushions arranged in a single row, with no visible separation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight, and padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, minimalist profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, blocky, and recessed legs, likely made of wood or metal, positioned at the corners and not prominently visible.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, and continuous backrest with three attached, uniform cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark upholstery with a smooth, matte finish on the front and sides; the back panel features a contrasting light gray fabric with a subtle woven texture.
